news.t: REX Shares Launches T-REX 2X PAAS (PAAU) & 2X SNDK (SNDU) ETFs

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long PAAS Daily Target ETF (PAAU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 200% leveraged exposure to the daily share price movements of Pan American Silver Corporation (PAAS), net of fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. PAAU was launched on Mar 12, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches T-REX 2X PAAS (PAAU) & 2X SNDK (SNDU) ETFs
